pages.raw_text:
Real estate firms are reporting
an extremely active market on
medium and low priced residence
property, and every indication
points to a steady demand for this
class of property.


G. A. Yancey & Co. state that
within a week they will place on
the market 100 acres on the North
hill, to be known as Glenwood
park.


Success has attended the sale of
Miller's park since it was placed
on the market by Slater & Slater
a few days ago. This property is
being purchased for home build
ing and investment.


lndeeding to the city the entire
system of water mains at Beauti'
full Spring mill J. w. Osborne has
set precedent that other owners
of additions will do we'll to fol.
low. The system has been laid
under the supervision of city
inspector and is of the six inch re-
inforced wooden pipe. Since this
addition was placed on the market
a short time ago great many lots
have been sold.
